reviews.title: What travelers say

quotes: Much easier than planning it myself.
More comfortable than a regular bus tour.
The pickup route made much more sense.
Felt smoother than I expected for a join tour.

cards.headline: Clear Pickup & Area Rules
cards.body: See hotel-area matching and pickup notes before booking, so there are fewer surprises later.
cards.footer: Hotel area check shown in the booking flow

cards.headline: Small-Group Comfort
cards.body: Enjoy a more comfortable day with easier pacing, simpler pickup, and a smaller group feel.

cards.headline: Local operator logic
cards.body: Designed around real tour operations, hotel pickup flow, and day-trip practicality.

tourTypes.privateBody: Your group only. AI plans the route; you confirm instantly.
tourTypes.joinBody: Small-group comfort, hotel-area pickup, clear pricing.

surcharge.title: Smoother Route for Everyone
surcharge.body: Because your hotel is outside the main pickup area, an additional pickup fee applies. This helps keep the route smoother for all travelers.
